(snapshot.systemDark ? "dark" : "light") : theme; const setTheme = useCallback((next: Theme) => { localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, next); applyTheme(next, true); emitChange(); }, []); return { theme, setTheme, resolvedTheme } as const; } ``` **Features:** - Uses `useSyncExternalStore` for external state management - Persists to `localStorage` with key `t3code:theme` - Supports: "light", "dark", "system" - Applies class `dark` to `document.documentElement` when dark theme active - Syncs across tabs via storage events - Listens to system preference changes with `window.matchMedia` - Prevents theme flash transitions with `no-transitions` class **Already Used in Settings:** - File: `apps/web/src/routes/_chat.settings.tsx` - Has THEME_OPTIONS array showing theme selector UI - Uses `useTheme()` hook to read/write theme --- ### 7. Key Component Organization **`apps/web/src/components/`** (25 components): - **UI Components** (`components/ui/`) - 40 shadcn-style components - button, input, select, dialog, toast, sidebar, switch, textarea, etc. - **Feature Components**: - `ChatView.tsx` (213KB) - Main chat interface - `Sidebar.tsx` (56KB) - Application sidebar - `DiffPanel.tsx` (24KB) - Diff viewer - `GitActionsControl.tsx` (30KB) - Git operations UI - `ThreadTerminalDrawer.tsx` (34KB) - Terminal interface - `ComposerPromptEditor.tsx` (23KB) - Editor for AI prompts - Plus component logic files (.logic.ts) with test files **`apps/web/src/hooks/`**: - `useTheme.ts` - Theme switching (already covered) - `useMediaQuery.ts` - Responsive design helper - `useTurnDiffSummaries.ts` - Diff summary hook **`apps/web/src/lib/`**: - React Query helpers: `gitReactQuery.ts`, `projectReactQuery.ts`, `providerReactQuery.ts`, `serverReactQuery.ts` - Tree utilities: `turnDiffTree.ts` - Cache: `lruCache.ts` - Keybindings: `projectScriptKeybindings.ts` - Cleanup: `terminalStateCleanup.ts` - Utils: `utils.ts` **`apps/web/src/routes/`** (TanStack Router): - `__root.tsx` - Root layout with providers - `_chat.tsx` - Chat layout wrapper - `_chat.index.tsx` - Default chat route - `_chat.$threadId.tsx` - Individual thread routes - `_chat.settings.tsx` - Settings page --- ### 9. packages/contracts Structure **Subpath exports:** - `.` - Main types (index.ts) **Main modules** (`packages/contracts/src/`): - `orchestration.ts` - AI orchestration types (largest, 36KB) - `providerRuntime.ts` - Provider runtime types (35KB) - `baseSchemas.ts` - Base schemas (Effect.ts) - `ipc.ts` - IPC/RPC contracts - `git.ts` - Git operations - `terminal.ts` - Terminal types - `provider.ts` - Provider configuration - `model.ts` - Model types - `keybindings.ts` - Keybinding types - `ws.ts` - WebSocket contracts - `server.ts` - Server configuration - `editor.ts` - Editor contracts - `project.ts` - Project types --- ### 10. Build & Development Configuration **Vite Config** (`apps/web/vite.config.ts`): ```typescript export default defineConfig({ plugins: [ tanstackRouter(), react({ babel: { plugins: [["babel-plugin-react-compiler", {...}]] } }), tailwindcss(), ], server: { port: 5733, strictPort: true, hmr: { protocol: "ws", host: "localhost" }, }, build: { outDir: "dist", emptyOutDir: true, }, }); ``` **Key Features:** - **Vite 8.0 beta** with React 19 - **React Compiler** plugin enabled (Babel) - **TanStack Router Plugin** for file-based routing - **Tailwind CSS Vite plugin** - **HMR via WebSocket** (for Electron compatibility) - **Source maps** controllable via env vars **Turbo Config** (`turbo.json`): - Global env vars for web: `PORT`, `VITE_WS_URL`, `T3CODE_*` - Build caching - Task dependencies (build depends on contracts) --- ### 11. Component Integration Pattern **Root route wrapper chain:** ``` RouterProvider → QueryClientProvider (TanStack Query) → StoreProvider (Zustand context) → ToastProvider → AnchoredToastProvider → App Routes (Outlet) ``` **Settings route** includes: - `useTheme()` hook - Gets current theme and setter - `useAppSettings()` - Model and provider preferences - `useQuery(serverConfigQueryOptions())` - Server config - Theme selector UI with three options: System/Light/Dark --- ### Summary Table | Aspect | Technology/Pattern | |--------|-------------------| | **Package Manager** | Bun 1.3.9 | | **Monorepo Tool** | Turbo 2.3.3 | | **Framework** | React 19.0.0 | | **Bundler** | Vite 8.0 beta | | **Language** | TypeScript 5.7.3 (strict) | | **Router** | TanStack Router 1.160.2 | | **State Management** | Zustand 5.0.11 (local) + TanStack Query 5.90.0 (server) | | **CSS Framework** | Tailwind CSS 4.0 | | **Component Library** | Base UI + shadcn/ui (base-mira) | | **Theme System** | CSS custom properties + localStorage | | **Testing** | Vitest 4.0.0 | | **Icons** | Lucide React 0.564.0 | | **Functional Lib** | Effect.ts | | **Editor** | Lexical | | **Terminal** | xterm.js 6.0.0 | This is a well-structured, modern TypeScript monorepo with strong typing, component organization, and a mature design system ready for theme enhancements.

## What was built

### 1. `packages/shared/src/themes.ts` *(new)*
Defines the shared `Theme` / `ThemeColors` interfaces and all three built-in themes:

| ID | Name | Mode |
|---|---|---|
| `t3-dark` | T3 Dark | dark (default) |
| `t3-light` | T3 Light | light |
| `t3-midnight` | T3 Midnight | dark, indigo accent |

Exports: `getTheme(id)`, `listThemes()`, `isThemeDark(theme)`, `DEFAULT_THEME_ID`.

### 2. `packages/shared/package.json` *(updated)*
Added `"./themes"` subpath export, following the existing pattern (`./model`, `./git`, etc.).

### 3. `apps/web/src/hooks/useColorTheme.ts` *(new)*
Module-level external store (same pattern as the existing `useTheme.ts`):
- Reads/writes `t3code:color-theme` in localStorage; persists the default on first visit
- `applyColorTheme()` sets all CSS custom properties inline on `<html>` (which beats any class-based stylesheet rule) — core tokens **plus** derived ambient tokens (`--muted`, `--border`, `--input`, etc.) and four new surface tokens (`--t3-sidebar-bg`, `--t3-editor-bg`, `--t3-terminal-bg`, `--t3-status-bar-bg`)
- Also toggles `.dark` and `color-scheme` so Tailwind `dark:` utilities stay in sync
- Syncs across tabs via `StorageEvent`
- Suppresses transitions during swaps (reuses the existing `.no-transitions` class)
- `useColorTheme()` returns `{ theme, setTheme, availableThemes }`

### 4. `apps/web/src/hooks/useTheme.ts` *(updated — 2 lines)*
Added a guard at the top of `applyTheme` so it exits early when the color-theme key is present in storage. This prevents `useTheme`'s dark-class logic from fighting with `useColorTheme`.

### 5. `apps/web/src/components/ThemeSelector.tsx` *(new)*
